message:
feat: nudge all SQLite users to migrate to Dolt

Remove the prefer-dolt gate from migration hints and doctor checks.
Since v0.50 defaults to Dolt, all SQLite users should be informed:

- migration_hint: shows once per 24h on any bd command
- bd doctor: always warns with migration command
- bd backend (JSON): always sets needs_migration for SQLite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
